metadata.description: Complete suite of modular plugins for Polymarket API development

plugins.name: polymarket-clob
plugins.description: Central Limit Order Book API - Trading operations, orderbook, pricing, and order management

plugins.name: polymarket-data
plugins.description: User data, positions, holdings, activity, and leaderboards

plugins.name: polymarket-gamma
plugins.description: Market discovery - Events, markets, series, search, and sports data

plugins.name: polymarket-websocket
plugins.description: Real-time data streams for user and market updates
